title: Runtime validation on 1039/45425 for provenance links

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Runtime validation pending. Blocked on operator confirmation to run live verification now that schema-less provenance path is in place.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Blocking issue: dashboard runtime TypeError in Next dev (webpack factory undefined / cannot read properties of undefined reading call). Investigating as regression from recent /lab/data and evaluation provenance changes; fixing before continuing runtime validation.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Diagnosed runtime crash cause: concurrent Next dev processes writing to dashboard/.next produced webpack cache corruption (incorrect header check) and missing vendor chunks (react-day-picker.js), which surfaced as TypeError reading 'call'. Mitigation confirmed: single Next dev process + clean .next cache restores /lab/reports and /lab/evaluations.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Applying route clarity change: use /lab/data/sources and /lab/datasets as canonical dataset/source dashboards. Updating navigation and internal links accordingly, and removing active /lab/data/datasets usage.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Implemented route clarity cutover: canonical sources route is /lab/data/sources and canonical datasets routes are /lab/datasets and /lab/datasets/:id. Removed tabbed /lab/data page and /lab/data/datasets/:id route, updated navigation + report/evaluation dataset links + docs. Verified with dashboard build:fast (success).

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Runtime validation executed with live runs against score 45425 on scorecard 1039 using associated dataset path. Required env for dataset-backed eval: AMPLIFY_STORAGE_DATASETS_BUCKET_NAME=amplify-d1cegb1ft4iove-ma-datasourcesbucketa1d38c0-vqhrgycupls2 (without it, setup fails before dataset load). Completed evaluations: c0803390-30c5-4d81-953e-ff254162df1f and ff262d63-6e4d-48b2-a66b-cc72f5d02d36. Verified via dashboard API query that both records persist scoreVersionId and parameters.dataset_id=1364adc8-302f-43a3-8673-f2b424cc1398; second run persisted baseline metadata pointing to c080... . Blocker discovered: explicit --version 59964640-6d7e-4ba3-83ed-84c385706fa1 logged No configuration found for version and then proceeded with champion version db3df9e6-2f78-4f0a-9876-48bd16515cdd instead of hard failure. This prevents true champion-vs-non-champion validation and violates one-path/no-fallback intent.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Re-validation after plx-516a4e fix: invalid explicit version now hard-fails (no silent champion continuation). Completed champion/non-champion provenance validation with real existing non-champion version: baseline eval c0803390-30c5-4d81-953e-ff254162df1f (scoreVersionId db3df9e6-2f78-4f0a-9876-48bd16515cdd), candidate eval f5c06117-8e33-4b83-968c-a2b755e65b63 (scoreVersionId e74601f9-e280-41b0-88b6-bafce78739a3, baseline metadata c080..., dataset_id 1364adc8-302f-43a3-8673-f2b424cc1398). Provenance fields now confirmed for link rendering path.
